@if (f.name.invalid && f.name.touched) {
@if (f.name.errors?.['required']) { Vendor name is required. } @if (f.name.errors?.['minlength']) { Minimum 3 characters needed. }
}

@if (f.contactEmail.errors?.['required']) { Email is required. } @if (f.contactEmail.errors?.['email']) { Enter a valid email address. }
}
@if (f.phoneNumber.invalid && f.phoneNumber.touched) {
@if (f.phoneNumber.errors?.['required']) { Phone is required. } @if (f.phoneNumber.errors?.['pattern']) { Enter a valid phone number. }
}
@if (f.taxId.invalid && f.taxId.touched) {
@if (f.taxId.errors?.['required']) { Tax ID is required. }
}
@if (f.address.invalid && f.address.touched) {
@if (f.address.errors?.['required']) { Address is required. }
}
}
